assertions.description: SpeechRecognition or webkitSpeechRecognition exists in window.

assertions.test: (() => { const SR = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition; if (!SR) return false; return 'quality' in SR.prototype; })()

assertions.description: The quality property accepts 'command' and it sticks.
assertions.test: (() => { const SR = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition; if (!SR) return false; const r = new SR(); r.quality = 'command'; return r.quality === 'command'; })()
